name: What if my firm has no Super Lawyers but competitors do—can I still rank?
description: Yes, use Best Lawyers + PR; diversify signals.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if my firm has no Super Lawyers but competitors do—can I still rank?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use Best Lawyers + PR; diversify signals.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, via alternative signals like Best Lawyers or consistent PR patterns, though harder in saturated markets.** AI weighs multiple authorities, not one. Competitors dominate without diversification. **Key factors:** 1) Cross-directory presence; 2) Review strength; 3) Niche expertise claims; 4) Phoenix-specific tweaks. Pursue 2-3 listings, align messaging, audit gaps. Diversify to compete.[1][3]
